results.title: Cosa Commences Partner Funded Ambient Noise Tomography Survey at the Astro Uranium Project, Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan
results.description: Vancouver, British Columbia–(Newsfile Corp. – June 26, 2026) – Cosa Resources Corp. (TSXV: COSA) (OTCQB: COSAF) (FSE: SSKU) (“Cosa” or the “Company“) is pleased to announce the commencement of an ambient noise tomography (“ANT“) survey at the Astro project (“Astro” or the “Project“). Astro is located in the eastern Athabasca Basin, approximately 28 kilometres west [...]
